dataset.description: The dataset contains four tables: batter_player_stats (batting statistics for individual players), bowler_player_stats (bowling statistics for individual players), detailed_player_data (per-match player performance data), and match_summary (match-level details including toss results, match outcome, player of the match, and venue information).

columns.description: Unique identifier for cricket players with batting role
columns.name: player_name

columns.description: Fixed role designation as 'Batter' for all records
columns.name: role

columns.description: Batting efficiency metric measuring runs per 100 balls faced
columns.name: strike_rate

columns.description: Lifetime count of balls received while batting
columns.name: total_balls_faced

columns.description: Occasional bowling success count despite batter primary role
columns.name: total_wickets_taken

columns.description: Runs given while bowling (usually minimal for batters)
columns.name: total_runs_conceded

columns.description: Occasional bowling contributions measured in overs
columns.name: total_overs_bowled

columns.description: Duplicate of total_matches_played showing batting specialization
columns.name: matches_played_as_batter

columns.description: Count of victories in participated matches
columns.name: matches_won

columns.description: Count of defeats in participated matches
columns.name: matches_lost

columns.description: National team affiliation with India being most frequent
columns.name: team

columns.description: Batting average (runs per dismissal) with extreme outliers
columns.name: average

columns.description: Unique identifier for specialized bowling players
columns.name: player_name

columns.description: Fixed role designation as 'Bowler' for all records
columns.name: role

columns.description: Career batting runs scored despite bowling focus
columns.name: total_runs

columns.description: Duplicate of total_matches_played showing bowling focus
columns.name: matches_played_as_bowler

columns.description: National team representation with India prominence
columns.name: team

columns.description: Runs conceded per over bowled (0.22-2.25 range)
columns.name: economy_rate

columns.description: Unique numeric identifier for individual matches
columns.name: match_id

columns.description: Player name with MS Dhoni as most frequent entry
columns.name: player

columns.description: Team representation per match (27 unique teams)
columns.name: team

columns.description: Count of boundary shots worth 4 runs
columns.name: fours

columns.description: Count of over-boundary shots worth 6 runs
columns.name: sixes

columns.description: Win/loss status from player's team perspective
columns.name: match_outcome

columns.description: Match location with Harare Sports Club most frequent
columns.name: venue

columns.description: Unique numeric identifier linking to detailed data
columns.name: match_id

columns.description: Host city with Colombo as most frequent
columns.name: city

samples: ICC Men's Cricket World Cup League 2
stats.top: ICC Men's Cricket World Cup League 2

columns.description: Choice to bat/field after toss win
columns.name: toss_decision

columns.description: Top performer with V Kohli most frequent
columns.name: player_of_match

columns.description: Participating teams with India/Sri Lanka frequent pair
columns.name: teams

desc: The dataset contains four tables: batter_player_stats (batting statistics for individual players), bowler_player_stats (bowling statistics for individual players), detailed_player_data (per-match player performance data), and match_summary (match-level details including toss results, match outcome, player of the match, and venue information).
goal: Analyze the consistency of individual player performances, focusing on how batters and bowlers vary in their runs, balls faced, wickets taken, and other statistics across different matches.
name: Visual Analytics System cricket_goal1_1742630196

plan.path: The user first examines player consistency patterns in View 1 (Overview) via avg-stdev scatterplot. Selecting a player filters View 2 (Exploration) to show temporal performance trends via line chart. Hovering on match dates triggers View 3 (Exploration) to display venue/opposition performance distributions. View 4 (Insight) reveals correlation between awards and consistency.

views.components: Drop-down selector to switch between batting/bowling metrics

effect.description: Filters subsequent views to show data for selected player(s)

visualization.description: Scatter plot showing players' batting consistency (average vs standard deviation of runs across matches). High performers cluster in upper-left quadrant (high mean, low variance).
encodings: x: aggregated mean(runs) scaled to player from detailed_player_data

visualization.description: Temporal line chart showing performance trends for selected players. Brushing shows sustained streaks or slumps.
Boxplots showing performance distribution against different opponents. Wide boxes indicate inconsistency.
Bubble chart correlating match awards with performance variability. Consistent top performers show low variance despite high awards.

data.reason: Joining career aggregates with per-match records through player_name+team would create data redundancy (career stats duplicated across all matches). Better to keep aggregated/baseline stats separate and enrich with temporal context from match_summary when needed
data.requirement: Create separate aggregated performance views (batters/bowlers) with temporal dimensions from match_summary rather than joining with detailed_player_data

visualization.reason: Heatmaps (frequency matrices) aren't suitable for showing within-category variance. Box plots better visualize distribution of runs/balls_faced/avg with quantiles - critical for consistency analysis
visualization.requirement: Use box plots instead of heatmaps to show performance variability distributions against opposition teams

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW overview_view AS SELECT dp.player, dp.matches_played, dp.total_runs, bp.player_name AS batter_name, bp.total_wickets_taken, bp.player_of_match_awards, bs.player_name AS bowler_name, bs.total_wickets_taken AS bowler_wickets FROM detailed_player_data dp JOIN batter_player_stats bp ON dp.player = bp.player_name JOIN bowler_player_stats bs ON dp.player = bs.player_name
sqls.name: overview_view

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW exploration_view AS SELECT dp.player, dp.runs, dp.match_id, ms.dates FROM detailed_player_data dp JOIN match_summary ms ON dp.match_id = ms.match_id WHERE dp.player = ?
sqls.name: exploration_view

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW insight_view AS SELECT dp.player, dp.player_of_match_awards, dp.match_id, dp.total_runs, bs.total_wickets_taken, bp.total_wickets_taken FROM detailed_player_data dp JOIN batter_player_stats bp ON dp.player = bp.player_name JOIN bowler_player_stats bs ON dp.player = bs.player_name WHERE dp.player = ?
sqls.name: insight_view

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW detail_view AS SELECT dp.player, dp.opposition_team, dp.venue, dp.runs, dp.wickets, bs.total_wickets_taken, bp.total_wickets_taken FROM detailed_player_data dp JOIN match_summary ms ON dp.match_id = ms.match_id JOIN batter_player_stats bp ON dp.player = bp.player_name JOIN bowler_player_stats bs ON dp.player = bs.player_name WHERE ms.dates = ?
sqls.name: detail_view
